# utf8proc (vendored)

- **Upstream repository:** https://github.com/JuliaStrings/utf8proc  
- **Version:** 2.9.0 — `utf8proc.h`, `utf8proc.c`, and `utf8proc_data.c` (included from `utf8proc.c`).
